title: check --witness/--estimate full
manager: The full `check` verb surface — `--witness` to get the coverage facts and evidence behind a verdict, and a complete `--estimate` of verification cost. This matures the honesty layer from v9's basic tri-state into a checker that shows its work: not just "safe" but "safe, and here is the witness," and not just "this might be expensive" but a real cost estimate before you commit the compute.
cs: `check --witness` (coverage facts / evidence) + full `--estimate`; matures the v9 budget/undecided tri-state (W6.98); the checker shows its work.
